briefdescription.para: A pointer to function taking and returning a Box.
Name of derived quantity.
Names of derived variables.
Type of derived quantity.
Number of components in derived quantity.
Function that computes derived quantity from state variables.
Interpolater for mapping crse grid derived data to finer levels.
Box mapper that specifies constituent region given derived region.
Total number of state variables.
Number of state ranges.
List of state data subranges required to derive given quantity.
Array of bndry types.
Identity mapping from destination to source boxes.

parameterdescription.para: Destination box passed to the callback.

briefdescription.para: Convenience mapper that grows the supplied box by one cell in every direction.

parameterdescription.para: Destination box; the return value is grow(box,1).

briefdescription.para: The destructor.
Non-copyable; derived metadata owns non-trivial resources.
Non-movable to keep internal pointers/registrations stable.
Copy assignment disabled for the same reason as the copy constructor.
Move assignment disabled to avoid dangling references inside registries.
The name of the derived type.
Return the name of derived component comp.
The IndexType of the derived type.
The DeriveFunc used to calculate the derived type.
Dimension-agnostic version of derFunc() that always takes 3-component bounds.
Callable that operates on a FAB-sized box instead of raw pointers.
MultiFab variant that fills directly without per-box callbacks.
Maps state data box to derived data box.
Type of interpolater to use in computing derived type.
Number of components in the derived type.
Number of different chunks of state data needed for derived type.
Total number of state variables needed for derived type.
The boundary conditions.
Boundary-condition array padded/truncated to three entries.
Describe which chunk of state data is needed for derived component range k.

parameterdescription.para: Range index in [0,numRange()).
Output: index into the state descriptor array.
Output: starting component in the chosen state.
Output: number of components to read.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, DeriveFunc der_func, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Construct a record driven by a Fortran-style DeriveFunc.

parameterdescription.para: Derived quantity name (unique registry key).
Index type describing the derived FAB layout.
Number of components produced by the derive function.
Function pointer invoked to compute the quantity.
Mapping from destination boxes back to source boxes.
Interpolater used when populating finer levels (defaults to piecewise-constant).

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, DeriveFunc3D der_func_3d, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Construct a record using a dimension-agnostic DeriveFunc3D callback.

detaileddescription.para: Parameters mirror the DeriveFunc constructor but der_func_3d follows the 3-D argument shape.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, DeriveFuncFab der_func_fab, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Construct a record whose implementation operates directly on FABs.

detaileddescription.para: Parameters match the scalar constructor but der_func_fab is a callable accepting FABs.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, DeriveFuncMF der_func_mf, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Construct a record whose implementation operates on MultiFabs.

detaileddescription.para: Parameters match the scalar constructor but der_func_mf takes MultiFabs.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, DeriveRec::DeriveBoxMap box_map)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Construct a placeholder record without attaching a callable yet.

parameterdescription.para: Derived quantity name.
Index type describing the derived FAB layout.
Number of components produced.
Mapping from destination boxes back to source boxes.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, Vector< std::string > const &var_names, DeriveFunc der_func, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: Same as the basic constructor but labels each derived component.

parameterdescription.para: Derived quantity name.
Index type describing the derived FAB layout.
Number of components produced.
Human-readable names for each component.
Fortran-style callback.
Mapping from destination to source boxes.
Interpolater override (defaults to piecewise-constant).

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, Vector< std::string > const &var_names, DeriveFunc3D der_func_3d, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: 3-D callback variant (parameters mirror the previous constructor).

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, Vector< std::string > const &var_names, DeriveFuncFab der_func_fab, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: FAB callback variant (parameters mirror the previous constructor).

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string name, IndexType result_type, int nvar_derive, Vector< std::string > const &var_names, DeriveFuncMF der_func_mf, DeriveBoxMap box_map, Interpolater *interp=&pc_interp)
memberdef.name: DeriveRec

briefdescription.para: MultiFab callback variant (parameters mirror the previous constructor).

memberdef.argsstring: (const DescriptorList &d_list, int state_indx, int src_comp, int num_comp)
memberdef.name: addRange

briefdescription.para: Append another chunk of state data requirements.

parameterdescription.para: Descriptor registry providing metadata.
Index into the descriptor list.
Starting component inside the chosen state descriptor.
Number of components to sample for this range.

briefdescription.para: Build the 1D/2D BC arrays from the registered state descriptors d_list.
Build the 3D BC arrays from the registered state descriptors d_list.
Derived Type Record.

detaileddescription.para: Computes quantities derived from state data.

DeriveRec is designed to compute quantities which can be derived from the state data contained in AmrLevel and its derivatives. Some examples might be kinetic energy, vorticity, concentration gradients ...
